mapper.select: SELECT img FROM cd_img WHERE indent_id = #{indentId} AND type = #{i} AND img is not null
SELECT count(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.track_state = 1 AND a.checkid = '调度'
SELECT count(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.phone is not null AND a.checkid = '调度'
SELECT count(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.check_time is not null AND a.checkid = '调度'
SELECT count(1) from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND b.voice is not null AND a.checkid = '调度'

SELECT a.id,a.plate,a.`name`,a.phone,a.remark,a.company,a.brand brand,b.id pbid,c.id cid,loss_vehicle lossVehicle from app_accident_record as a LEFT JOIN app_push_bill as b ON b.accid = a.id LEFT JOIN app_message_car as c on c.mess_id = b.id
WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.checkid = '调度'
AND b.track_state = 1
AND a.phone is not null
AND b.check_time is not null
AND b.voice is not null
AND c.vehicle_results = 3
AND c.vehicle_results = 2
AND c.vehicle_results = 4
AND c.vehicle_results is not null
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC limit #{pagesize},20
SELECT * FROM app_push_bill WHERE accid = #{id} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 0,1
